violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Particle board shelving in BOH storage area has water damage/swelling.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Grab n go cooler has a buildup of food debris and mold and need to be cleaned and sanitized. Reach in pizza prep cooler/cutting board needs detail cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have a buildup of dust/debris under shelving units in storage area and need to be cleaned.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Mop stored in utility sink. Store in a position allowing for proper drying.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied in a way that prevents contamination to food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Store chemical spray bottles away from clean equipment at 3 tub sink. Spray bottles currently hanging from wire rack shelf above drain tray of 3 tub sink.
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
